channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Court clears way for Louisiana law requiring Ten Commandments in classrooms to take effect
item.description: The 5th U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals has cleared the way for a Louisiana law requiring displays of the Ten Commandments in public classrooms to take ...

item.title: How Nazgul the wolfdog made his run for Winter Olympic glory in Italy
item.description: Nazgul isn't talking, but his owners come clean about how he got loose, got famous, and how they feel now

item.title: Opinion: The enduring dignity of Jesse Jackson
item.description: Rev. Jesse Jackson died this week at age 84. NPR's Scott Simon remembers covering Jackson's 1984 presidential campaign in Mississippi.

item.title: From cubicles to kitchens: How empty offices are becoming homes
item.description: Many U.S. cities have too many office buildings and not enough homes. Developers are now converting some old offices into apartments and condos, but i...

item.title: US military airlifts small reactor as Trump pushes to quickly deploy nuclear power
item.description: The Pentagon and the Energy Department have airlifted a small nuclear reactor from California to Utah, demonstrating what they say is potential for th...

item.title: India’s Sarvam launches Indus AI chat app as competition heats up
item.description: Sarvam's Indus chat app is currently available in beta.

item.title: ICE is quietly buying warehouses for detention centers and leaving local officials out of the loop
Google VP warns that two types of AI startups may not survive
item.description: As generative AI evolves, a Google VP warns that LLM wrappers and AI aggregators face mounting pressure, with shrinking margins and limited differenti...

item.title: OpenAI debated calling police about suspected Canadian shooter’s chats
item.description: Jesse Van Rootselaar's descriptions of gun violence were flagged by tools that monitor ChatGPT for misuse.

item.title: 7 days until ticket prices rise for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
item.description: Lowest ticket prices to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 end February 27. Up to $680 off individual passes and up to 30% off group passes. Register before they...

item.title: The creator economy’s ad revenue problem and India’s AI ambitions
item.description: The creator economy is evolving fast, and ad revenue alone isn’t cutting it anymore. YouTubers are launching product lines, acquiring startups, and bu...

item.title: All truckers and bus drivers will be required to take commercial driver’s license tests in English
America’s Most Underwater Housing Markets Present a Golden Opportunity For Investors
item.description: The combination of foreclosures and falling housing prices is like throwing chum into the water for a group of hungry sharks eager for deals. In some ...

item.title: Supreme Court strikes down Trump’s sweeping tariffs, sparking fierce pushback and vow of new levies
item.description: President Donald Trump says he’s imposing a temporary global tariff of 10% after his far-reaching tariff regimen was struck down by the Supreme Court.

item.title: The Biggest Homebuyer Discounts in Over 12 Years | Feb. 2026 Update
item.description: Homebuyers are getting the biggest discounts on properties in over 12 years—and it’s only getting started. At this point, nobody can refute that a ful...

item.title: Should I Use My Home Equity to Buy My Next Rental Property? (Rookie Reply)
item.description: Should you use your home equity to buy a rental property? Whether it’s your primary residence or another investment property, this strategy could help...

item.title: Off by Nearly 1 MILLION Jobs? Why New Jobs Report Will Impact Rentals
item.description: Big economic news dropped last week: labor data, inflation rates, and huge jobs revisions. All of these are already impacting the housing market, but ...

item.title: How the Wealthiest Have Programmed Their Portfolios This Year
item.description: Despite stock markets hovering around record highs, investors are feeling jittery. You can see it in consumer confidence collapsing to its lowest leve...
